Interface Plugin

public interface Plugin
Core interface that all plugins must implement. Defines the lifecycle methods for a plugin.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    destroy()
    Destroys the plugin and releases all resources.
    PluginMetadata
    getMetadata()
    Gets the metadata for this plugin.
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes the plugin.
    void
    start()
    Starts the plugin.
    void
    stop()
    Stops the plugin.

  • Method Details

    • getMetadata

      PluginMetadata getMetadata()
      Gets the metadata for this plugin.
      Returns:
      the plugin metadata

    • initialize

      void initialize() throws PluginException
      Initializes the plugin. Called once when the plugin is first loaded.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if initialization fails

    • start

      void start() throws PluginException
      Starts the plugin. Called when the plugin should begin its work.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if start fails

    • stop

      void stop() throws PluginException
      Stops the plugin. Called when the plugin should cease its work.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if stop fails

    • destroy

      void destroy() throws PluginException
      Destroys the plugin and releases all resources. Called when the plugin is being uninstalled.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if destruction fails
